---
title: "Memorialicidio: human rights heritage under threat"
description: "Patrimonio y memorias represivas."
venue: "Memory Studies"
tipo: articulo
doi: "10.1177/17506980251388300"
date: "2025-03-01"
author: "Badilla Rajevic, M., Infante-Batiste, V., & Abarca Paillicán, G. E."
authors: [manuela-badilla]
reference: "Badilla Rajevic, M., Infante-Batiste, V., & Abarca Paillicán, G. E. (2025). Memorialicidio: human rights heritage under threat. *Memory Studies*. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1177/17506980251388300)"
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
    body-classes: publicacion-page
---

# Memorialicidio: human rights heritage under threat

Patrimonio y memorias represivas.

**Autores OLES:** [Manuela Badilla Rajevic](../equipo/manuela-badilla.html)

**Fecha:** 2025.

## Referencia sugerida

Badilla Rajevic, M., Infante-Batiste, V., & Abarca Paillicán, G. E. (2025). Memorialicidio: human rights heritage under threat. *Memory Studies*. DOI 10.1177/17506980251388300.

[← Volver a Publicaciones](index.qmd)
